# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",

    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"

      "type": "string"

    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24

      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-plan')]"

      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-ai')]"

      "type": "string"

      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosAccountName": {
      "type": "string"

    "storageApiVersion": "2023-01-01",

    "insightsApiVersion": "2020-02-02",
    "keyVaultApiVersion": "2023-07-01",
    "sqlApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
    "cosmosApiVersion": "2024-02-15-preview",
    "roleAssignmentsApiVersion": "2022-04-01",
    "functionIdentityRoleStorageBlobDataContributor": "ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe",
    "functionIdentityRoleStorageQueueDataContributor": "974c5e8b-45b9-4653-ba55-5f855dd0fb88",
    "functionIdentityRoleStorageTableDataContributor": "0a9a7e1f-b8b1-4cc2-9d63-3d1b8f9a9d46",
    "functionIdentityRoleKeyVaultSecretsUser": "4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6",
    "functionIdentityRoleSqlDbContributor": "9b7fa17d-e63e-47b0-bb0a-15c516ac86ec",

    "functionIdentityRoleCosmosDbBuiltInDataContributor": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"

  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('storageApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Insights/components",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('insightsApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('appInsightsName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "web",
      "properties": {
        "Application_Type": "web"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('webApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Y1",
        "tier": "Dynamic"
      },
      "properties": {
        "reserved": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('webApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "ftpsState": "Disabled",
          "minTlsVersion": "1.2",
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION",
              "value": "~4"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME",
              "value": "dotnet-isolated"
            },
            {
              "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageApiVersion')).keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
            },
            {
              "name": "APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY",
              "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName')), variables('insightsApiVersion')).InstrumentationKey]"
            },
            {
              "name": "APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING",
              "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName')), variables('insightsApiVersion')).ConnectionString]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentsApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'storage-blob-contributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('functionIdentityRoleStorageBlobDataContributor'))]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('webApiVersion'), 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentsApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'storage-queue-contributor')]",

      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('functionIdentityRoleStorageQueueDataContributor'))]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('webApiVersion'), 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",

      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('functionIdentityRoleStorageTableDataContributor'))]",

        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentsApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'kv-secrets-user')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('functionIdentityRoleKeyVaultSecretsUser'))]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('webApiVersion'), 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentsApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'sql-db-contributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('functionIdentityRoleSqlDbContributor'))]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('webApiVersion'), 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentsApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'cosmos-account-reader')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosAccountName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('functionIdentityRoleCosmosDbAccountReaderRole'))]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('webApiVersion'), 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "functionAppPrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",

    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    }
